title: The Fourth Tenant Story Theme Loop
prompt: Story: The Fourth Tenant (the-fourth-tenant) | Hook: Rent is collected from an apartment that appears on no official map. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: EERIE | Location: Flood-district prewar apartment block | Villain: The Landlord of Rooms That Move | Villain worldview: People accept impossible rooms when paperwork feels safe. | Motifs: door chains, wet plaster, rent slips.
